details.request: Review the harness engineering guide documents and design the best approach for the next planned Validator-A execution wrapper and retry handoff automation.

spec.objective: Produce a design proposal for Validator-A wrapper and retry handoff automation based on the existing harness documentation.
success_criteria: Review relevant architecture, agent, workflow, schema, operation, and existing guide documents.
Identify current constraints and invariants that the design must preserve.
Propose an implementation architecture, file layout, data flow, command interface, and validation gates.
Call out risks, tradeoffs, and recommended phasing.
Do not implement code unless the user asks to proceed.
scope: scripts relevant to generator and audits
out_of_scope: Changing files other than task ledger/session notes

details.branch_omission_reason: Design-only analysis; no implementation branch required.

checks.name: document_review
checks.evidence: Reviewed AGENTS, ARCHITECTURE, SECURITY, agent docs, lifecycle, failure handling, context management, output/task schemas, tool/work-history/git/eval operations, generator guides, run-generator.mjs, package scripts, and relevant insights.

checks.name: codex_cli_surface
checks.evidence: Local codex-cli 0.125.0 supports codex exec --json, --output-schema, --output-last-message, --ephemeral, --cd, --sandbox read-only/workspace-write/danger-full-access, and approval policy never.

checks.name: design_scope
checks.evidence: Design keeps Validator wrapper as a thin controller and separates validation, retry handoff preparation, and merge execution.

details.summary: Completed design review for Validator-A execution wrapper and retry handoff automation. Recommended implementing a thin Validator controller, separate retry-preparation script, schemas for validator handoff/result/retry input, and strict gates for resource failures, repeated errors, and Tier 3 isolation.
details.validation: Analyst document and local CLI review PASS.
details.merge_omission_reason: Design-only Tier 1 analysis; no task branch merge required.
details.quality_score_skipped_reason: Tier 1 design-only response; no guide/product implementation in this task.

insight_capture.reason: Design is captured in the user-facing response and no new operational gotcha requires guide mutation yet.
